baseline.reason: Correctly identifies the root cause (missing NULL check on pbkdf2_param->salt at line 421) and the trigger path. Slightly imprecise about crash location — says crash occurs at line 436 (pbkdf2_salt->data) when the first NULL dereference actually occurs at line 421 (pbkdf2_param->salt->value.octet_string). This is a minor factual inaccuracy but does not undermine the overall root cause analysis.

vastdb.reason: Accurately pinpoints the root cause (NULL dereference on pbkdf2_param->salt at line 421, before salt->value.octet_string is accessed). Correctly identifies that the crash occurs at line 421 as the first dereference, not at line 436. Trigger path is complete and precise. No unsupported speculation.
